title: Progress EK2716PH Go Healthy Dual Omelette Maker - Non-Stick, Twin Cooking Chambers, Compact, Easy To Use Multicooker, Use Little to No Oil, Fluffy Omelettes/Pancakes, Indicator Lights
features: Enjoy delicious, low-fat, protein-packed omelettes with this Handy Omelette Maker from Progress, the perfect addition to any household.
With dual cooking chambers, you can make up to 2 omelettes at once with a combine cooking surface of 18cm. With 750W power make healthy light lunches and easy snacks within minutes.
Boasting practical non-stick plates that heat up in 2-3 minutes, your omelette can be smoothly removed and clean-up is quick and easy.
With safety features such as cool touch handles allow you to open your maker safely while cooking, and a compact built in cord storage.
The versatile grill not only makes delicious omelettes but also your favourite tasty treats such as cakes, pastries, pancakes and more.
description: Product Description Omelette Maker Make perfect, fluffy omelettes every time with the 750 W Handy Omelette Maker from Progress. Designed with the user in mind, the multi-cooker can make two omelettes at once, with little to no oil, and no flipping required, perfect for a busy breakfast or lunch time. Compact and practical, this electric omelette maker boasts a built-in cord storage to keep your worktops looking tidy at all times. The convenient non-stick plates mean more time to enjoy your omelette and less time cleaning. Previous page Non-Stick Plates Heats up in 2-3 minutes, your omelette can be smoothly removed and clean-up is quick and easy. Healthy Cooking The versatile grill not only makes delicious omelettes but cakes, pastries, pancakes, wraps and more Deep Fill Omelettes With a deep fill, dual cooking chamber the 750W cooker can make light lunches and easy snacks Cool Touch Handles Cool touch handles allow you to open your maker safely and has power & ready indicator lights. Next page 1 Preheat In Minutes 2 Versatile Cooking 3 Dual Cooking Chamber 4 Safe To Use Est.1931 Innovation & Progression Established in 1931, Lancashire brand Progress has always strived to be at the forefront of style and design, whilst never forgetting what makes a kitchen the heart of any home. The focus of innovation and progressions has enabled Progress to now provide an extensive range of products with a modern, clean-cut twist. A classic brand with a 21st century feel, Progress offers everything a kitchen could possibly need.
